headline: FedEx earnings, mortgage rates, jobless claims: What to Watch
summary: Market Domination Overtime Host Josh Lipton previews several of the biggest stories to come tomorrow, Thursday, March 19, including earnings results from Alibaba (BABA, 9988.HK) and FedEx (FDX); US mortgage rates and new home sales; and the latest reading on initial jobless claims data.

headline: RELEX Solutions Announces Expanded Partnership with Lowe's to Strengthen Their Supply Chain Agility
summary: RELEX Solutions today announced that it will be extending its relationship with Lowe's Companies, Inc. (NYSE: LOW) and Accenture (NYSE: ACN) to unify Lowe's inventory replenishment and allocation platform. This partnership, featuring RELEX's AI-driven technology and Lowe's proprietary supply chain technology, enhances efficiency, improves inventory availability, and drives productivity across Lowe's stores, merchandising, and supply chain operations to better serve the home improvement retailer'

summary: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is one of the best ethical companies to invest in now according to Reddit. headline: Accenture Databricks Group Targets Scalable Enterprise AI And Undervalued Shares
summary: Accenture (NYSE:ACN) announced the launch of a new Databricks Business Group. The group is designed to help enterprises use Databricks to scale AI applications and agents. The move aims to make enterprise AI more accessible across industries and large organizations. For Accenture, this new Databricks Business Group sits at the intersection of cloud data platforms, AI services and large scale consulting work with global enterprises. It builds on the company’s existing AI projects and prior...

headline: How To Earn $500 A Month From Accenture Stock Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
summary: Accenture (ACN) will release Q2 earnings on March 19. Analysts expect $2.84/share earnings and $17.83B revenue. To earn $500/mo, an investor needs 920 shares or $182,767.
